description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, overhanging roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front features a covered porch with two dark columns supporting the overhang, and a wooden deck leading to the main entrance. Large rectangular windows dominate the upper and lower floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of light gray and white, with a darker stone or concrete base along the bottom. One side of the house includes a protruding section with a single large window, while the rear has a set of double glass doors. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, straight lines, and functional outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a covered front porch with a wooden deck. The exterior features a mix of light gray, white, and dark stone finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, wooden deck, large windows, and main entrance.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a protruding section with a single large window and minimal detailing.
description_view_2: Side view with a set of double glass doors and a single window, showing the house's depth and geometric lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall and the edge of the porch visible, emphasizing the flat roof and clean lines.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden deck, two dark columns, and a modern main door under a flat overhang
